overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit commercial district at night during heavy rain. The camera follows the character from a covered plaza with digital billboards, past a neon-lit bar, through an underpass, and onto a busy multi-lane street with elevated highways.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered commercial plaza with wet paved tiles reflecting neon lights from digital advertising pillars. The camera follows a character with a distinctive umbrella past vending machines and seated NPCs, approaching a neon-lit bar area in the distance.

exiting the bar area into a covered underpass corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a futuristic bar area dominated by a curved neon-lit counter with purple and pink lighting. After passing the bar stools and a wooden food cart, the scene transitions into a more industrial underpass corridor.

events.description: exiting the underpass into the open rainy street with visible traffic

segments.scene_description: The camera travels through a concrete underpass with a massive digital billboard wall on the left. Groups of pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera while the target character moves ahead toward the bright exit where rain and traffic become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street with elevated highways in heavy rain

events.description: heavy rain becomes visible with water streaming down and wet reflective road surface
multiple vehicles driving past on the wet multi-lane road with headlights reflecting

agents.ego_description: walking along the rainy street sidewalk next to moving traffic under elevated highways

notable_agents.action: cars driving on the wet road with headlights reflecting off the pavement
pedestrians walking on the sidewalk with umbrellas

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway ramp with green accents overhead
twin elevated highway structure forming a canyon-like street environment
large concrete pillar with palm tree at base dividing the road
wide asphalt road with multiple lanes wet from heavy rain
vintage-style yellow car parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast urban canyon with massive elevated highways overhead during a heavy downpour. The camera moves along the wet multi-lane road where vehicles drive past with headlights reflecting off the rain-slicked asphalt, while pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the sidewalks between concrete support pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit commercial plaza into a vast, rain-drenched urban canyon. It begins by following a character with an umbrella across wet paved tiles reflecting digital advertising pillars, moving past vending machines toward a distant bar. As the camera enters the bar area, the environment shifts into a space dominated by a curved purple and pink neon counter and a wooden food cart before transitioning into a concrete industrial underpass. The scene then travels past a massive digital billboard wall and oncoming pedestrians, moving toward a bright exit where the shelter ends. Finally, the camera emerges into a heavy downpour beneath massive elevated highways, gliding along a multi-lane road where vehicle headlights reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt.
